name: Halfling
description: A halfling reaches adulthood at the age of 20 and generally lives into the middle of his or her second century. Most halflings are lawful good. As a rule, they are good-hearted and kind, hate to see others in pain, and have no tolerance for oppression. Halflings average about 3 feet tall and weigh about 40 pounds. You can speak, read, and write Common and Halfling.
